---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `bash hydra.sh`
2. Select option '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Logs
```
# Paste output of: tail -30 ~/.hydra/hydra.log
```

## Environment
- **Device:** (e.g. Redmi Note 10)
- **Android version:** (e.g. Android 11 / MIUI 12)
- **Termux version:** (run `termux-info | head -3`)
- **Python version:** (run `python --version`)
- **Flask version:** (run `pip show flask | grep Version`)

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or details.
